seoTitle: How to Create a Checkout Page in GoHighLevel
metaDescription: Learn how to build a checkout page in GoHighLevel, from adding products to configuring payments, to reduce cart abandonment.
intro: A smooth checkout page can be the difference between a completed sale and an abandoned cart. This tutorial walks through creating a checkout page in GoHighLevel, covering products, layout, and payment configuration.

steps.heading: Set up your products
steps.body: Add the products or services you want to sell so they're available to include on your checkout page.

steps.heading: Design your checkout layout
steps.body: Choose and customize a layout that presents your offer clearly and keeps the buying process simple.

steps.heading: Configure payment methods
steps.body: Set up the payment options you want to accept so customers can complete their purchase directly on the page.

steps.heading: Apply best practices for conversions
steps.body: Keep the checkout process short and clear to minimize cart abandonment and improve conversion rates.

faq.question: What payment methods can I accept on a GoHighLevel checkout page?
faq.answer: GoHighLevel generally supports common payment processors, letting you accept major credit cards and other configured payment methods.

faq.question: Can I sell subscription products through a GoHighLevel checkout page?
faq.answer: Yes, GoHighLevel supports both one-time and recurring subscription-based products on checkout pages.

faq.question: Do I need coding experience to build a checkout page?
faq.answer: No, GoHighLevel's checkout page builder is designed to be usable without any coding knowledge.

faq.question: Can I add order bumps or upsells to my checkout page?
faq.answer: Yes, GoHighLevel typically supports adding order bumps and upsells to increase the average order value.
